cnbc.title: Iran has no intention to hold talks with U.S; foreign minister says Trump proposal to end war being reviewed
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

cnbc.title: Republicans balk at Senate Democrats' DHS shutdown counteroffer
cnbc.summary: Congress and the White House are working to reach a funding deal before Congress leaves for a scheduled two-week recess on Friday.

cnbc.title: How the Iran war could crush the U.S. housing recovery, and it's not just about mortgage rates
cnbc.summary: A combination of higher mortgage rates and economic uncertainty are reversing what was expected to be a recovery year in the housing market.

cnbc.title: U.S. Postal Service seeks 8% fuel surcharge for package deliveries as Iran war raises oil prices
cnbc.summary: Oil prices have jumped more than 40% since Feb. 28, when the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran.

cnbc.title: Republicans block Democratic push for Trump Jr. subpoena
cnbc.summary: The presidents family businesses have been heavily scrutinized during his second term in the Oval Office.

cnbc.title: Jury in Los Angeles finds Meta, YouTube negligent in social media addiction trial
cnbc.summary: A jury reached a verdict in the LA trial focused on Meta and YouTube, a case that experts have characterized as social media's "Big Tobacco" moment.

cnbc.title: White House says Trump will meet Xi in China in May
cnbc.summary: A long-awaited meeting between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping will take place in Beijing on May 14 and 15, the White House said.

cnbc.title: Space stocks rally on reports of SpaceX's imminent IPO filing
cnbc.summary: Space stocks, including AST SpaceMobile, Rocket Lab and Firefly Aerospace, rallied after a report that SpaceX may file to go public this week.

cnbc.title: Meta cutting several hundred jobs across Reality Labs, Facebook and other departments
cnbc.summary: The layoffs come as Meta has been refocusing its efforts and pouring billions of dollars into AI.

cnbc.title: Elon Musk calls for Delaware judge to recuse herself in lawsuits, alleging bias
cnbc.summary: The Tesla and SpaceX CEO is calling for a judge to recuse herself in two shareholder lawsuits that are winding their way through Delaware's courts.
